summary: South Bay startups pulled in nearly $4 billion across 24 funding rounds in the past six weeks, with AI and semiconductors dominating. Nexthop AI's $500M Series B and SiFive's $400M Series G anchor a wave of late-stage bets, while hiring remains steady across the region—seven companies actively expanding. Most notably, robotics and chip-design startups are attracting outsized capital as the industry consolidates around automation and next-gen compute.
